displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Spread noodle into boiling water
2. After 5 minutes, go to the exact hardness
3. Put the noodle in clean water, and dry it

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Store in room temperature
• Keep away from high temperature
• Avoid direct sunglight

1. Spread noodle into boiling water
2. Boil until preferred hardness
3. Put the noodle in clean water, and dry it

• Store in room temperature

metaData.Ingredients: Salt, Pansalt, Low Sodium, Water, Plain Wheat Flour
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• Cooking Method (1):
1. Wash the bean mee with cold water but do not soak it
2. Cook the bean mee with the prepared soup for 4 - 5 minutes
• Cooking Method (2):
1. Wash the bean mee and cook with boiling water for 4 - 5 minutes
2. Drain dry and fry with the prepared ingredients
• Cooking Method (3):
1. Immerse in boiling oil until it turns brownish
2. Drain dry, and mix in the prepared ingredients
Microwave over 2 mins or boiling water 10 mins

product.name: CJ Fresh Cooked Instant Rice - White

metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat, Palm Oil [Antioxidants (307B, 304)], Creamer (Glucose, Palm Fat, Sodium Caseinate), Seasoning Oil, Garlic), Tapioca Starch, Salt, Dehydrated Egg (Contains Lactose), Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Dehydrated Vegetables (Carrot, Spring Onion), Sugar, Milk, Soya Sauce (Soya, Wheat), Thickeners (412, 414), Spices (Garlic, Pepper, Chilli), Yeast Extract, Chicken Extract (Chicken, Chicken Flavouring), Acidity Regulators (501, 500, 451, 450, 330, 300, 331), Flavouring Powder [Hydrolysed Plant Protein (Soya)], Colours (150C, 160A, 160B), Stabilisers (340, 420, 1400), Emulsifier (471), Anti-caking Agent (551)
• This product contains wheat, egg, soya, milk and sesame
metaData.Key Information: This instant cup noodle contains a broth with a chicken base flavour whilst having a distinct aroma and provides a hint of seafood taste
metaData.Preparation:
1. Pull lid back halfway and pour boiling water up to inner line
2. Close lid for 3 minutes
3. Remove lid and add seasoning oil, stir well and serve

product.name: Nissin Instant Cup Noodles - Kyushu White

metaData.Ingredients:
Noodles: Wheat flour, Palm oil, Salt, Sodium dihydrogen phosphate, Disodium diphosphate, Guar gum, Potassium
carbonate and Sodium carbonate.
Soup Seasoning: Salt, Flavour enhancer (E621), White pepper powder, Sugar, Hydrolysed plant protein (corn, soybean,
wheat gluten, fully hydrogenated soybean oil), Tapioca starch (contains sulphites) and Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides
(E627, E631).
metaData.Key Information: This product is white pepper flavoured.

Cooking instructions:
1. Cook Fairprice Instant Noodles in 400ml (1½ cup) of boiling water for 2 minutes
2. Add in the soup seasoning, stir evenly
3. Ready to serve

tags.name: Chinese New Year 2022
tags.tagLine: Shop now and stand to win!

metaData.Preparation:
1. Put vermicelli in boiling water for about 5 to 7 minutes
2. When vermicelli are cooked, drain away the water
3. Fry ingredients of your choice eg. meat, seafood, vegetables, etc in hot pan then add vermicelli and fry evenly
4. Season to taste and serve
metaData.SAP Product Name: SING LONG KOREAN SWEET POTATO VERMICELLI

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Buckwheat Flour Salt, Water
metaData.Key Information:
• Authentic Japanese noodle of the highest quality
• 98% fat free
• Great for stir-fry and easy to prepare
• Produced in patented high-temperature, short-time drying method which gives the noodle a firm texture
metaData.Nutritional Data:

Cholesterol 0mg
Protein 10.6g
Total Fat 1.6g
Saturated Fat 0g
Carbohydrate 63.2g
Sugars < 1g
Dietary Fibre 2.8g
Sodium 828mg
Sodium (After cooking) 72mg
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 4 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For Stir-Fry:
1. Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 3 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain, then rinse well with cold water
Drain again
• To Reheat:
Briefly submerge in hot water

metaData.Ingredients: High Protein Wheat Flour, Water, Salt, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Silicate C140
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook the noodles in boiling water for about 2 minutes, (for broad ribbons about 3 minutes)
2. Stir tenderly until the noodles have loosened
3. Drain the hot water and then soak it thoroughly in clear cold water
4. Then serve with your favourite recipe

product.description: Hakubaku Japan searched the world for the finest ingredients. The fertile lands of Australia were found to provide these premium ingredients for a traditional Japanese favourite.

metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat Flour (96%), Salt (4%), Water
• Contains wheat and gluten
• Manufactured on shared equipment with soy, egg and buckwheat
metaData.Key Information:
• Authentic highest quality Japanese noodle
• Quick and Japan-easy dish every night of the week
metaData.Preparation:
• For cooking:
Cook organic udon in rapid boiling water for 10 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For stir-fry:
1. Cook orgainic udon in rapid boiling water for 8 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain and rinse well with cold water
3. Drain again

product.name: Hakubaku Organic Udon Noodle

product.description: • Good Today - Good Choice for Today

metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat, Buckwheat, Salt
• Allergen Advice: Contains Wheat, Buckwheat
metaData.Key Information:
• Chewy buckwheat noodles perfect for a variety of dishes
• Experience the perfect balance of smooth, chewy texture and the rich, nutty aroma of buckwheat
• Delicious in cold broths, warm soups, or spicy mixed sauces
metaData.Nutritional Data:
AttributesPer Serving (100g)
Energy336kcal
Protein9g
Total Fat1.3g
Saturated Fatunder 0.5g
Carbohydrate72g
Sugars1.2g
Sodium1128mg
metaData.Preparation:
1. Boil 1,200cc(6 cups) of water, then add 200g of buckwheat noodles(serves 2). Cook for about 6-7 minutes.
2. Rinse the cooked noodles in cold water 3-4 times, gently rubbing them. Drain well and shape into servings.
• Tips
Enjoy with soba sauce, green onions, radish, wasabi, and seaweed. Great for cold soba, spicy mixed noodles, or sesame oil noodles.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

product.name: Good Today Buckwheat Noodles

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Edible Palm Oil, Salt
metaData.Key Information:
• Have your noodles fried; with meat gravy or just in soup
• No preservatives and colouring
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for about 2 minutes
2. Stir until noodle cake loosens
3. Drain the hot water and rinse noodles thoroughly in clear cold water
4. Then serve in your favourite recipe
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

product.description: Treat yourselves to the light and healthy taste of Koka noodles.

metaData.Key Information:
• Cooked through a fully-automatic, steaming and air-drying process
• Suitable for vegetarians
• Cholesterol-free
• No preservatives and colouring
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for 2 - 3 minutes
2. Rinse cooked noodles thoroughly in clear cold water for dry or cold dishes
3. Drain immediately
4. Serve with your favourite recipe

metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

product.name: Koka Non-Fried Plain Instant Noodles - Low Fat

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Palm Oil, Starch, Potassium Chloride, Sugar, Chilli, Wheat Flour, Yeast, Garlic, Maltodextrin, Coriander, Flavourings (contain soya), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate, Onion, Cumin, Citric Acid, Aniseed, Tumeric, Caramel, Ginger, Fenugreek, Canola Oil, Clove, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Paprika Guar Gum, Anti-caking Agent (E551).
• May contain: Crustaceans, Fish, Milk, Celery and Mustard
metaData.Key Information: Made with 11 secret spices infused with real chillies that are slow cooked to perfection, it is no surprise why this is every Singaporeans’ favourite. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For Soup
1. Bring 2 cups of water (350ml) to boil
2. Add in noodle cake, soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Cook for 2 minutes and enjoy!
• For Dry
1. Cook noodle cake for 1 minute and drain off the water
2. Fry noodles with soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Enjoy!

• Cooking instruction:
1. Cook Hakubaku Organic Soba in rapid boiling water for 4 minutes
2. While boiling, salt or oil is not needed
• For stir fry:
1. Cook Hakubaku Organic Soba in rapid boiling water for 3 minutes as the noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok
2. Drain the excess water and rinse well with cold water
3. Drain the excess water again
• To reheat:
Briefly submerge in hot water

metaData.Key Information: Neoguri features plump and al dente noodles that is complimented by the deep, clean broth. Top it off with chunks of Korean kelp to provide a touch of unique characteristic to this dish that has been a favourite since its release.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Boil 550ml (about 2 1/4 cup) of water
2. Add noodles, soup base and vegetable mix
3. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
4. Remove from heat and serve

1. Empty noodles and soup mix into 360ml of boiling water
2. Simmer gently for 2 minutes
3. Serve immediately
